positive: A mystical, stylized forest silhouette against a vibrant, glowing nebula background. The forest is composed of diverse, whimsical flora: bioluminescent mushrooms, curled vines, and crystalized trees. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, focusing on deep emerald greens, amethyst purples, and electric cyan accents. The overall style is neo-tribal mixed with ethereal watercolor ink, rendered with clean, stark lines and high contrast. Ensure the foreground elements create a strong, recognizable silhouette effect suitable for screen printing on fabric. Minimal details, maximum impact. Full saturation, vibrant color palette. Highly detailed, commercial graphic design, vector art style.
